Video.title: The Science Behind Kitchens & Bedrooms

Video.title: The Principles of Space Planning

Video.title: Zac Brown & Toya Wright

Video.title: Rickey Smiley & Phaedra Parks

Video.summary: Sabrina's guests bring the burn, talk ultra-chic wardrobes, and share a budget-friendly dinner plan.
Video.title: The High Low Life

Video.summary: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.
Video.title: Tom's "Team Monarch"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.
Video.title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Leah heads to Dana Spinola's posh pad and NFL veteran Matt Schaub's mega mansion.
Video.title: Dana Spinola & Matt Schaub

Video.summary: Leah heads to comedian George Wallace's hotel-chic penthouse and Superbowl MVP Hines Ward's contemporary crib.
Video.title: George Wallace & Hines Ward

Video.summary: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.
Video.title: Living in Art: Kaleidoscopic Homes

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.
Video.title: Kayla & Ryan’s Toddler To-Do List

Video.summary: Jack and Tyler have made their home picture-perfect, but now it’s time for the exterior to shine.
Video.title: Jack & Tyler’s Colorful Curb Appeal

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Peek inside Los Angeles-based designer Dani Dazey’s pink bungalow in Highland Park, California.
Video.title: Prismatic & Patterned LA Bungalow

Video.summary: Michelle Boudreau celebrates the Palm Springs lifestyle in this mid-century modern abode.
Video.title: Mid-Century Palm Springs Style

Video.summary: Designer David Brian Sanders proves that a black and white palette is modern, chic and fabulously interesting.
Video.title: Monochromatic Mod Linda Flora

Video.summary: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.
Video.title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat

Video.title: Cocina De Sabrina

Video.title: Peaceful Palm Desert Remodel

Video.title: The Imagination Library's Magical Makeover
